parameters.query: SELECT * FROM librarian_want_list WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY priority DESC LIMIT 20

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO librarian_content (content_hash, title, author, source, source_url, local_file_path, file_format, subject_category, confidence_score, acquired_at) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), '{{$json.title}}', '{{$json.author}}', '{{$json.source}}', '{{$json.source_url}}', '{{$json.filepath}}', 'pdf', '{{$json.category}}', {{$json.confidence}}, datetime('now'))
